content.text:
All 8 tests pass. The existing implementation already handles negative coordinates correctly because it uses a Set-based approach with string-encoded coordinates, which has no dependency on grid bounds or non-negative indices.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: No changes needed - existing implementation already handles negative coordinates
- Result: All 8 tests pass
- Approach: The Set-based encoding (`${x},${y}`) and neighbor iteration via offsets work identically for negative integers; no implementation change was required to make the test pass
